CREATE TABLE geometries (id INT, shape GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geometries (id, shape) VALUES (1, st_ewkt_read('POLYGON((0 0,0 10,10 10,10 0,0 0))'));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, shape) VALUES (2, st_ewkt_read('POINT(1 2)'));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, shape) VALUES (3, st_ewkt_read('LINESTRING(0 0,5 5,10 0)'));
SELECT id, st_astext(shape) FROM geometries WHERE st_area(shape) > 0;
WITH translated AS (SELECT id, st_translate(shape, 1, 1) AS new_shape FROM geometries) SELECT id, st_astext(new_shape) FROM translated WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geometries WHERE st_ewkt_read('POLYGON((1 1,1 2,2 2,2 1,1 1))') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM geometries WHERE st_intersects(shape, st_ewkt_read('LINESTRING(5 5,5 10)'));
SELECT id FROM geometries g1, geometries g2 WHERE st_touches(g1.shape, g2.shape) AND g1.id <> g2.id;
SELECT st_astext(st_union(g1.shape, g2.shape)) FROM geometries g1 JOIN geometries g2 ON st_overlaps(g1.shape, g2.shape);
